case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. JESUS A. CHAVEZ

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, JESUS A. ,AN INDIVIDUAL DBA RECORD ONE AUTO DETAILING SERVICE $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT CHAVEZ, JESUS A. ,AN INDIVIDUAL DBA RECORD ONE AUTO DETAILING SERVICE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
